name: KEYCORP /NEW/
summary: KeyCorp, headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, is a bank holding company and one of the largest bank-based financial services companies in the U.S., with approximately $184.4 billion in total assets as of December 31, 2025. Through KeyBank National Association and other subsidiaries, it offers retail and commercial banking, commercial leasing, investment management, consumer finance, student loan refinancing, commercial mortgage servicing, investment banking, and capital markets products to individual, corporate, and institutional clients across 15 states.

products.name: Restricted Stock Unit Award
products.description: Equity compensation awards granting contingent rights to receive KeyCorp Common Shares upon vesting under the 2019 Equity Compensation Plan.

products.name: Retail Banking
products.description: Deposit and lending products offered through 940 full-service branches across 15 states.

products.name: Commercial Banking
products.description: Borrowing, cash management, and capital markets services for middle market and large corporate clients.

products.name: Investment Management
products.description: Portfolio management for retirement plans, foundations, endowments, and high-net-worth individuals.

products.name: Commercial Mortgage Servicing
products.description: Third-party master and special servicing of commercial mortgage loans nationally.

products.name: Student Loan Refinancing
products.description: Student loan refinancing products offered through Consumer Bank and digital brand.

products.name: KBCM Capital Markets Platform
products.description: Syndicated finance, debt/equity underwriting, sales and trading, derivatives, FX, M&A advisory, and public finance.

products.name: Treasury Services
products.description: Cash management and treasury services for individuals and businesses.

products.name: Wealth Management
products.description: Banking, trust, portfolio management, and charitable giving services for non-profit and high-net-worth clients.

products.name: Merchant Services
products.description: Payment and merchant processing services offered to businesses.

products.name: Community Development Financing
products.description: Community development financing provided through nonbank subsidiaries.
